# Boldify

> Free utility tool that converts text to Unicode-styled characters (bold, italic, strikethrough, underline) for LinkedIn posts. Multi-language (EN/FR/ES/PT/DE/TR/PL). Open source.

## Available Tools

- MCP server: https://api.boldify.net/mcp
  - convert: transform HTML or Markdown to Unicode-formatted text
  - syntaxes: read formatting reference at boldify://syntaxes/markdown and boldify://syntaxes/html

## Citable Pages

- [Home](https://boldify.net/en): tool overview and live editor
- [How It Works](https://boldify.net/en/how-it-works): 4-step process explaining the Unicode mechanism
- [Help / FAQ](https://boldify.net/en/help): common issues, mobile rendering, screen reader notes
- [About](https://boldify.net/en/about): creator and project background
- [MCP](https://boldify.net/en/mcp): integration guide for Claude Desktop and other MCP clients
